narrative:
Green Township (precinct in Adams County) has 359 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
